input_request.prompt: can you how me an image of me wearing it

context.occasion: beach-side leisure with possible transition to dinner
context.climate: hot sunny beach conditions with light wind and easy-going social setting

analysis.why_this_works_now: The user asked specifically for a VTO (visual outfit try-on) for the beach line, so the recommendation focuses on one cohesive day-to-evening look that stays understated, practical, and comfortable in heat while still looking polished near the riad or dinner.
analysis.persona_alignment: This works because the user values understated authority, textured neutrals, and outfits that can be worn open or with a jacket. The beach context calls for softness and ease, so the outfit stays low-key rather than sharp or heavily tailored.
analysis.profile_alignment: The pieces match the inferred body preference for room through the midsection, longer top layers, and straight higher-waist trousers. They also respect the budget range by staying in the premium but non-brand-heavy territory, and they fit the described wardrobe role as a host-facing, guest-pleasing operator.
analysis.prompt_alignment: All recommendations are directly tied to the last user message, which asks for a VTO for the beach line. The response stays within that scope and does not drift to unrelated styling or shopping instructions.

recommendations.label: Muted olive and cream VTO with soft jacket
recommendations.logic_summary: A polished beach-to-evening look that stays understated through color, texture, and proportion. Olive keeps it grounded in the local palette, cream softens the heat, and the jacket gives a finished shape without overt formality.

pieces.styling_note: Wear open to keep it beach-appropriate and use the olive tone to stay grounded rather than pale and washed-out.
The cream keeps the look light for heat while still being sophisticated for dinner; avoid tapering and keep a straight leg.
Keep it open for the beach and easy to remove if needed; the jacket adds polish without making the outfit heavy.
Use a dark brown leather sandal to keep the outfit grounded and respectful while still feeling beach-appropriate.

scene.occasion: beach-side leisure with possible transition to dinner
scene.setting: a beach-side setting with a relaxed daytime beach atmosphere and a subtle evening transition context, palm trees, soft shoreline, light patio or terrace elements, understated luxury coastal vibe
scene.lighting: soft natural beach-side light with gentle warmth, realistic skin tones, balanced exposure, subtle shadow, and a calm outdoor photography aesthetic

pieces.description: muted olive long-sleeve shirt, open at the neck, relaxed fit, breathable cotton-linen blend, clean front, subtle texture, understated beach-to-evening style

warm gray soft jacket, lightweight cotton-linen blend, open over the shirt, relaxed fit, minimal styling, easy to remove if needed
dark brown leather sandals, simple polished finish, understated beach-appropriate footwear

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash prompt generator for virtual try-on. Render a photorealistic image of the user wearing the specified outfit. Prioritize realism, accurate body proportions, natural garment drape, true-to-life color, and believable outdoor lighting. Keep the image retailer-agnostic and editorially clean. Use the attached headshot reference as the visual basis for identity, face, and style. Do not invent a different person, change the outfit, add accessories, or alter the photo realism. Follow the style context exactly.
prompt.user: Create a photorealistic virtual try-on image of me wearing the recommended outfit: a muted olive long-sleeve shirt, cream higher-waist trousers, a warm gray soft jacket, and dark brown leather sandals. Show me outdoors on a beach-side setting in Cape Town, with soft natural light and a relaxed day-to-evening mood. Keep the styling understated and polished: shirt open at the neck, jacket worn open, trousers high-waisted and relaxed, minimal detailing, and footwear simple and beach-appropriate. Emphasize breathable cotton-linen fabrics, realistic texture, natural body proportions, accurate garment fit, and true-to-life color rendering. The image should feel like a candid luxury lifestyle photo of me at a beach-side leisure day that could transition to dinner, with palm trees or a subtle coastal backdrop, soft shoreline, and gentle evening transition context.
